title: Opening a Checking Account
description: First visit to the bank as a new resident. Pick the right account type, ask the right questions.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good afternoon. How can I help you?

templates.text: I'd like to open a checking account. I'm new to the country.
templates.hint_zh: 我想開個支票帳戶,我剛來這個國家。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Welcome! Do you have your passport and proof of address?

templates.text: Yes, my passport, my visa, and a recent utility bill.
templates.hint_zh: 有,護照、簽證,還有最近的水電費帳單。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. Are you looking for any specific features?

templates.text: I want no monthly fee and free international transfers if possible.
templates.hint_zh: 希望不收月費,如果有免手續費的國際轉帳更好。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Our basic account waives fees if you keep at least 1500 dollars. Wires are not free, but online transfers are.

templates.text: What's the difference between online and wire transfers?
templates.hint_zh: 網路轉帳跟電匯有什麼差?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Online is for accounts at partner banks — same day, free. Wires are for anywhere else, with a fee.

templates.text: Got it. Let's go with the basic account.
templates.hint_zh: 了解,那我選基本帳戶就好。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great. I'll start the paperwork. It takes about fifteen minutes.
